title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 12.5%.

items.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: She rows back and forth so much even in the excerpts in this article that it's clear she's just saying whatever pops into her head and I just want to say "Kemi! This is a country that you want to be prime minister of!...
items.content_text: She rows back and forth so much even in the excerpts in this article that it's clear she's just saying whatever pops into her head and I just want to say "Kemi! This is a country that you want to be prime minister of!...

items.title: Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Burnham still wins even if you add the Reform/Restore/Con vote – always clear his personal popularity would be the key factor.
items.content_text: Burnham still wins even if you add the Reform/Restore/Con vote – always clear his personal popularity would be the key factor.

items.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: Very impressed by Burnham on that Question Time panel. He said various things I disagreed with of course, but presentationally he's striking: Empathetic, articulate, emotionally and intellectually engaged, with a sens...
